name: Bus Love
description: Emma moved to Evergreen Glades a year ago, seeking a slower, more thoughtful life away from the city’s noise. She quickly fell in love with the small town’s charm: the sprawling forest edges, quiet streets, and, most of all, the breathtaking sunsets over the glades that paint the sky in oranges, pinks, and purples, her favorite time of day to reflect and dream.
creator: 678hgm78
